hero_title: Prioritize What Matters. Ship What Counts.
hero_subtitle: WSJF Planning gives enterprise Agile teams a data-driven formula to rank backlog items by business value, time criticality, and job size — eliminating guesswork from PI Planning.
hero_social_proof: Trusted by Agile teams running SAFe, Scrum, and Kanban
trust_label: Built for modern enterprise Agile frameworks
problem_title: Backlog prioritization shouldn't be a guessing game.
problem_text: Most teams prioritize features based on loudest stakeholder, gut feeling, or whoever wrote the ticket last. The result: wrong things get built, sprints get derailed, and value delivery suffers.
solution_title: WSJF gives you a formula — not an opinion.
solution_text: Weighted Shortest Job First (WSJF) is the prioritization framework at the heart of SAFe PI Planning. It quantifies business value, time criticality, risk, and job size into a single score that your whole team agrees on.
features_title: Everything your team needs for structured PI Planning
features_subtitle: From scoring to stakeholder voting to reporting — built for enterprise Agile at scale.
feat_wsjf_text: Automatically calculate WSJF scores using Business Value, Time Criticality, Risk Reduction, and Job Size. Individual and consensus voting built in.
feat_voting_text: Invite Product Owners, Architects, and stakeholders to vote on estimates. Aggregate scores with one click. No spreadsheets, no email chains.
feat_multitenant_text: Each organization gets a fully isolated workspace. Manage multiple teams, programs, or Agile Release Trains under one account.
feat_roles_text: Four roles — SuperAdmin, Admin, Planner, Voter — give you fine-grained control over who sees, edits, and votes on your backlog.
feat_sprint_text: Feed WSJF-ranked backlogs directly into sprint planning. Align PI objectives with sprint capacity and track committed vs. delivered.
feat_reporting_text: Track key planning metrics: velocity, commitment accuracy, score distribution. Export reports for leadership and ART sync meetings.
steps_title: From setup to prioritized backlog in minutes
step1_text: Register and set up your organization's workspace in seconds. Multi-tenant isolation means your data stays yours.
step2_text: Add Product Owners, Architects, and stakeholders with the right roles. Voters can join without a full account.
step3_text: Import or create backlog items. Assign them to programs, sprints, or PI iterations.
step4_text: Facilitate live WSJF scoring with your team. Everyone votes; scores are tallied automatically.
step5_text: Export a rank-ordered backlog with WSJF scores. Feed it straight into your PI Planning board.
pricing_text: Start with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Scale as your team grows.
pricing_note: Per-seat subscription · Cancel anytime · SSO available on Enterprise plan
security_title: Built for organizations that care about data.
security_isolation_text: Every organization's data is fully isolated. No cross-tenant data leakage by design.
security_rbac_text: Granular permissions at every level. Control who reads, writes, and votes.
security_privacy_text: Hosted in the EU. GDPR-compliant. Your backlog data never leaves your control.
